name: Serrano Grits with Cheese
keywords: cheese corn mexican side dish vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 each Serrano Chiles; seeded and chopped
1 1/2 cups Cheese; 6 oz (Use Shredded Monterey Jack Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Serrano Chiles should be seeded and chopped.
2. Use Shredded Monterey Jack Cheese in this recipe.
